Lending Liquidation Sentinel — finds Aave V3 positions on Base close to liquidation. Returns positions with health factor below threshold, with collateral/debt breakdown and estimated liquidation profit. Supports ?protocol=aave&chain=base&threshold=1.1&demo=true.

Full domain intelligence — WHOIS, multi-resolver DNS, SSL/TLS certs, Wappalyzer tech detection, security header audit, CT log subdomains, redirect chain — all 7 in parallel with individual timeouts. Partial results on component failure. Weighted overall grade (SSL×2 + headers×1.5 + redirect×1). AI agent API for complete domain due diligence, M&A assessment, security posture scoring, and competitive analysis ($0.02)

Redirect chain analysis — follows up to 10 hops (301/302/303/307/308) with per-hop timing in ms, status codes, TLS status, Server header. Detects HTTPS-to-HTTP TLS downgrade, redirect loops, excessive chains. A-F grade (A=direct/1-hop, D=downgrade, F=loop). SSRF-validated per hop via IP pinning. AI agent API for SEO redirect auditing, phishing chain analysis, URL shortener resolution, and HTTPS migration validation

Subdomain discovery via crt.sh Certificate Transparency logs — finds all subdomains with issued SSL certificates. Handles multiline entries, strips wildcard prefixes, deduplicates, sorted output. Discovers API endpoints, staging servers, mail servers, and forgotten infrastructure. AI agent API for attack surface mapping, bug bounty recon, subdomain enumeration, shadow IT detection, and domain takeover prevention

Security header audit — 10 headers: CSP, HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, X-XSS-Protection, CORP, COEP, COOP. Info leakage detection via Server, X-Powered-By, X-AspNet-Version. A-F grade (A=9-10 present, F=0-2). AI agent API for OWASP compliance, web security auditing, pentest recon, and hardening assessment

Technology stack detection via Wappalyzer (1000+ signatures) — web servers (Nginx, Apache, IIS), CMS (WordPress, Shopify, Drupal), JS frameworks (React, Vue, Angular, Next.js, Svelte), CDN (Cloudflare, Fastly, Akamai), analytics (Google Analytics, Hotjar). HTTPS with HTTP fallback. AI agent API for competitive intelligence, website profiling, lead enrichment, and tech market research

SSL/TLS certificate analysis — issuer (Let's Encrypt, DigiCert, Cloudflare, Comodo), SAN list, serial number, validity period, days until expiry. TLS 1.0/1.1/1.2/1.3 individual probing with OpenSSL 3.x awareness. Automated A-F grade (A=modern TLS only, F=expired/no cert). TOCTOU-safe IP pinning. AI agent API for SSL monitoring, PCI DSS compliance, expired cert detection, CA verification, and TLS auditing

DNS multi-resolver lookup — A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME, SOA across Google 8.8.8.8, Cloudflare 1.1.1.1, Quad9 9.9.9.9 in parallel. SPF mechanism parsing, DMARC policy extraction (p=reject/quarantine/none), resolver inconsistency detection (DNS hijacking/BGP leak signal). NXDOMAIN returns structured exists:false. AI agent API for DNS monitoring, email deliverability, SPF/DMARC compliance, DNS hijacking detection, and propagation checks

WHOIS registration lookup — registrar, creation/expiry/updated dates, domain age in days, name servers, DNSSEC, registrant country/org, EPP status codes. All TLDs (.com .net .org .io .dev .ai ccTLDs gTLDs). Per-field error resilience for TLD-specific parsing quirks. AI agent API for domain due diligence, brand protection, phishing domain detection, expiry alerting, and M&A research

Get stablecoin distribution by blockchain — total circulating USD-pegged value on Ethereum, Tron, BSC, Arbitrum, Polygon, Solana, and every supported chain. Track stablecoin flows and chain-level liquidity depth. AI agent API for cross-chain liquidity analysis, stablecoin flow monitoring, and chain-level DeFi health assessment

Get DeFi protocol fee and revenue data — daily and weekly fee totals, revenue breakdowns, and protocol earnings for any tracked protocol. Essential for protocol valuation and yield analysis. AI agent API for DeFi revenue intelligence, protocol economics research, and yield farming analytics

Get DEX trading volume analytics — total market 24h volume, per-protocol rankings (Uniswap, PancakeSwap, Curve, etc.), and chain-level breakdowns. Covers all major decentralized exchanges tracked by DeFi Llama. AI agent API for DEX market share analysis, trading venue comparison, and DeFi volume monitoring

Get comprehensive stablecoin market data — circulating supply by peg type (USD, EUR, algorithmic), chain-level distribution, market cap rankings, and issuer info for USDT, USDC, DAI, and 100+ stablecoins. AI agent API for stablecoin market intelligence, peg monitoring, and DeFi liquidity analysis

Get current token prices from DeFi Llama aggregated price feeds — supports batch queries with chain:address format (e.g., ethereum:0x..., bsc:0x...). Returns price, symbol, decimals, and confidence score. AI agent API for DeFi portfolio valuation, on-chain price monitoring, and automated trading price feeds

Get current Total Value Locked (TVL) for any DeFi protocol — real-time aggregate value across all deployed chains. Essential metric for protocol health and market positioning. AI agent API for DeFi analytics, protocol monitoring, and investment sizing

List all 5,000+ DeFi protocols tracked by DeFi Llama — TVL rankings, category classification, multi-chain deployment info, and protocol metadata. The definitive DeFi protocol directory. AI agent API for DeFi market overview, sector analysis, and protocol discovery

Get comprehensive DeFi protocol data — TVL breakdown by chain, category classification (Lending, DEX, Liquid Staking, Yield, etc.), token info, audit status, and historical TVL trends. Covers 5,000+ protocols tracked by DeFi Llama. AI agent API for protocol due diligence, DeFi market research, and investment analysis

Get real-time gas prices across multiple EVM chains in a single batch request — standard, fast, and instant tiers for Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Base, BSC, Optimism, and more. AI agent API for gas cost optimization, transaction timing strategy, and multi-chain fee monitoring

List all bridge protocols and DEX aggregators supported by LI.FI — Stargate, Across, Hop, Connext, Celer, 1inch, 0x, Paraswap, and 30+ tools with their supported chains and features. AI agent API for bridge protocol comparison, DEX aggregator selection, and cross-chain infrastructure intelligence

List all tokens available for cross-chain bridging on a specific chain — includes token addresses, symbols, decimals, and bridge compatibility. Filter by chain key (eth, pol, arb, base, etc.). AI agent API for bridgeable asset discovery, cross-chain liquidity mapping, and token availability checks

List all blockchain networks supported by LI.FI bridge aggregator — Ethereum, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, BSC, Avalanche, Fantom, zkSync, and 30+ chains with chain IDs, names, and native token info. AI agent API for multi-chain bridge coverage mapping and cross-chain infrastructure planning

Get multiple cross-chain bridge routes with advanced filtering — specify preferred bridges, max slippage, gas price limits, and route optimization priority (cheapest, fastest, safest). Returns ranked alternatives with step-by-step execution plans and fee breakdowns. AI agent API for cross-chain execution strategy, DeFi automation, and institutional bridge routing. Premium endpoint ($0.01)

Get optimal cross-chain bridge and swap quote — compare rates across 20+ bridges (Stargate, Across, Hop, Connext) and DEX aggregators (1inch, 0x, Paraswap) in a single request. Returns best route by cost, speed, or reliability with gas estimates and slippage prediction. AI agent API for cross-chain arbitrage, automated portfolio rebalancing, and multi-chain treasury management. Premium endpoint ($0.01)

List all blockchain networks supported by GoPlus security scanning — Ethereum, BSC, Polygon, Arbitrum, Base, Optimism, Avalanche, Fantom, Solana, and 20+ chains with chain IDs and names. AI agent API for multi-chain DeFi coverage planning and security infrastructure mapping

dApp security audit by URL — check smart contract audit status, trust list inclusion, known vulnerability history, and user-reported risks. Covers major DeFi protocols, NFT marketplaces, and web3 applications. AI agent API for dApp discovery safety, protocol risk assessment, and automated due diligence

Check if a wallet address is flagged as malicious — query multiple security databases for known scammers, exploit attackers, rug pull deployers, and sanctioned entities. Returns malicious behavior classification and data source attribution. AI agent API for counterparty risk screening, on-chain AML, and transaction pre-validation

Check token approval security risks — detect unlimited allowances, suspicious spender contracts, revoked-but-cached approvals, and high-risk approval targets. Essential for wallet hygiene and approval management. AI agent API for DeFi wallet security auditing and approval risk monitoring

Simulate an EVM transaction before execution — preview gas costs, token balance changes, approval modifications, and detect potential risks like sandwich attacks or unexpected token transfers. Supports any EVM chain including Ethereum, BSC, Polygon, Arbitrum, and Base. AI agent API for smart contract interaction safety, automated trading pre-flight checks, and transaction risk preview. Premium endpoint ($0.01)

Check if a URL is a known phishing or scam site targeting crypto users — covers fake DEX frontends, wallet drainers, approval phishing pages, and counterfeit DeFi protocol clones. Real-time detection powered by GoPlus threat intelligence database. AI agent API for web3 security, browser extension safety checks, and user protection

Rug pull risk detection for token contracts — analyze ownership concentration, renounced vs. active admin keys, proxy upgrade patterns, hidden mint functions, and liquidity lock status. Multi-factor risk scoring across code, ownership, and on-chain behavior. AI agent API for DeFi investment risk assessment and automated scam detection

NFT contract security audit — detect privileged minting/burning, proxy upgradability, restricted approval mechanisms, self-destruct risks, and hidden transfer fees. Covers ERC-721 and ERC-1155 collections on any EVM chain. AI agent API for NFT marketplace safety and collection due diligence

Address security check — detect malicious wallets, known phishing addresses, scam contracts, and blacklisted entities across all EVM chains. Chain-independent lookup against GoPlus multi-chain security database. AI agent API for transaction screening, AML compliance, and wallet risk scoring

Token security audit on Solana — detect honeypots, freeze authority, mint authority abuse, and holder concentration risks. Full SPL token analysis including metadata verification and liquidity pool checks. AI agent API for Solana DeFi safety and memecoin risk assessment

Comprehensive token security audit on any EVM chain — detect honeypots, hidden buy/sell taxes, proxy contracts, mintable supply, blacklist functions, and holder concentration risks. Covers Ethereum, BSC, Polygon, Arbitrum, Base, and 20+ chains. AI agent API for DeFi portfolio risk management, automated trading safety checks, and token due diligence

Comprehensive AI content analysis — extract text then analyze with Gemini for sentiment scoring (-1.0 to 1.0), topic classification, named entity extraction, content type detection (news/blog/docs/tutorial), and credibility assessment. AI agent API for content intelligence, media monitoring, and competitive research

AI-powered content summarization — extracts clean text from any URL then generates a concise 2-4 sentence summary, 3-5 key points, and named entity extraction (people, organizations, products, locations, events) using Gemini Flash-Lite. Handles articles, blog posts, documentation, and news pages. AI agent API for content summarization, research automation, and intelligent web browsing

Extract clean, readable text content from any web page — removes navigation, ads, scripts, and boilerplate using trafilatura (F1=0.909 accuracy) with Jina Reader fallback for JS-rendered pages. Returns content with metadata including title, author, word count, language, and reading time. Handles HTML and plain text. AI agent API for content extraction, text mining, and web scraping with clean output

Extract and classify all hyperlinks from a web page into internal vs external categories using eTLD+1 domain matching. Returns up to 200 internal and 200 external links with counts. AI agent API for SEO link analysis, web crawling, and site structure mapping

Extract structured metadata from any web page — title, author, publication date, Open Graph tags, canonical URL, language detection, word count, and estimated reading time. Handles HTML meta tags, og:title/description/image, and article:published_time. AI agent API for content curation, SEO analysis, and web page metadata extraction

Look up MX (Mail Exchange) DNS records for any domain — returns whether mail servers exist and their hostnames sorted by priority. Essential for verifying email deliverability before sending. Supports all TLDs including ccTLDs and new gTLDs. AI agent API for email infrastructure verification, domain reputation assessment, and bulk email pre-send validation

Check if a domain is a known disposable or temporary email provider — covers Guerrilla Mail, Mailinator, Temp Mail, 10MinuteMail, and 5,000+ disposable domains from a community-curated blocklist (CC0 licensed, updated regularly). Returns instant boolean result. AI agent API for signup fraud detection, form spam prevention, and email quality filtering

Comprehensive email validation: syntax (RFC 5322), MX records, disposable detection (5,000+ domains), free provider check (Gmail, Yahoo, Outlook), role-based detection (admin@, info@), typo suggestion (gmial.com). Returns 0-1 confidence score with detailed per-check results. POST protects email addresses from access logs. AI agent API for lead qualification, signup fraud prevention, CRM hygiene, email deliverability

Get the next upcoming Japanese public holiday and days until it — returns the holiday name, exact date, and countdown for planning around Tokyo market closures and gotobi day shifts. Covers all national holidays through 2099. AI agent API for Japanese market closure forecasting, FX position management around holidays, and automated trading schedule adjustments

Check if today is a Japanese public holiday — returns the holiday name in Japanese and English if applicable. Uses JST timezone for accurate date determination. Covers all national holidays, substitute holidays, and special observances. AI agent API for Japanese market open/close detection, FX trading session validation, and holiday-aware order management

List all Japanese public holidays for a given month (YYYY-MM format) — includes national holidays, substitute holidays (振替休日), and Golden Week dates. Essential for FX trading calendars as holidays affect gotobi day shifts, Tokyo market closures, and JPY liquidity windows. AI agent API for Japanese market calendar intelligence, FX trading day validation, and holiday-aware trade scheduling

List all gotobi dates for a given month (YYYY-MM format) — returns the full monthly calendar of effective trading dates with weekend and Japanese public holiday adjustments already applied. 6 dates per month (5th, 10th, 15th, 20th, 25th, last business day), shifted to preceding business day when falling on non-trading days. AI agent API for monthly FX trading calendar generation, backtesting date alignment, and USDJPY seasonal pattern analysis

Get the next upcoming Japanese FX gotobi day and days until it — returns the exact date with Japanese public holiday adjustments applied. Essential for pre-positioning USDJPY trades ahead of the Tokyo fixing at 9:55 JST. AI agent API for FX trade scheduling, gotobi countdown alerts, and systematic trading calendar management

Check if today is a Japanese FX gotobi day (五十日) — the 5th, 10th, 15th, 20th, 25th, and last business day of each month when Japanese corporations settle USD payments, creating predictable USDJPY buying pressure before the 9:55 JST Tokyo fixing. Accounts for weekend and Japanese public holiday adjustments to preceding business day. AI agent API for FX trading automation, USDJPY strategy timing, and algorithmic trading calendar intelligence

Get daily weather forecast (1-7 days) for any city worldwide — max/min temperature, precipitation amount and probability, and peak wind speed per day. Supports city name (geocoded automatically) or latitude/longitude coordinates. Powered by Open-Meteo (CC BY 4.0). AI agent API for multi-day weather planning, agricultural decision support, event scheduling, and travel itinerary optimization

Get current weather conditions for any city worldwide — temperature, feels-like, humidity, wind speed and direction, precipitation, and human-readable condition description. Supports city name (geocoded automatically via Open-Meteo) or latitude/longitude coordinates. Covers every location on Earth with data updated every 15 minutes. Powered by Open-Meteo (CC BY 4.0). AI agent API for weather-aware trading strategies, logistics planning, and location-based decision making

AI-synthesized intelligence report — searches 14 sources in parallel, then synthesizes findings with Gemini AI. Returns structured analysis with summary, key findings, sentiment, trends, and recommendations. AI agent API for comprehensive market research, competitive analysis, and technology trend forecasting.
